## Contribution type

- [ ] Attack catalog addition
- [ ] Coded attack (reproduction script)
- [ ] Documentation fix
- [ ] Taxonomy structure change (new or revised family, category, or leaf)

## Description

What changed and why?

## Related issue

Closes # (or "None" for small fixes)

## What files were changed?

For attack additions, confirm both the category doc and `attacks.yaml` were updated.

## Evidence

Link to the supporting paper, report, or testing results. For taxonomy structure changes, include a completed [taxonomy structure template](TAXONOMY_STRUCTURE_TEMPLATE.md) in the PR.

## Checklist

- [ ] No copy-paste attack prompts included
- [ ] Linked to supporting evidence (paper, report, or testing results)
- [ ] Table formatting renders correctly (preview the Markdown)
- [ ] I have reviewed existing entries to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I understand this taxonomy is CC-BY-4.0 licensed and my contribution will be openly available
